full_text:
Hu Miao (Jingcai) 胡邈 (敬才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Miao (胡邈), styledJingcai (敬才). Liked by Li Jue. Tried to calm an angry Huangfu Li to protect him. Hu Miao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Li Jue.
